title: oligoneuron riddellii
intro: Oligoneuron riddellii, also known as Riddell's goldenrod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oligoneuron riddellii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of allergies, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Oligoneuron riddellii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
